title: S.W.A.T Police Toy Dart Shotgun Set | Kids Toys | Police Toy Gun
features: Freeze - This S.W.A.T Toy Shotgun Set has everything a little one could want to be equipped for taking on the bad guys
Put Your Hands Up - Shoot plastic darts at your enemy's and reload with your pump action shotgun, it's perfect for playing cops and robbers
You Have The Right Look Awesome - Treat your child to this fantastic set and watch their eyes come alive as now they can role play and pretend to be a protector of civilization
Full Gear Included - 1x shotgun, 8x plastic darts
description: Product Description The Kandy toys "S.W.A.T" dart gun play set is the perfect accessory to children's pretend play. Featuring a replica pump action shotgun and 8 suction cupped darts. Build your own targets and practice for the next "S.W.A.T" mission. Safety Warning Caution. Small Parts. Choking Hazard. Suitable for Age 3+
